name: MSP_chrIV_cluster
description: Major Sperm Protein (MSP) tandem-duplicated cluster on C. elegans chromosome IV. MSP is a ~14 kDa amoeboid-locomotion cytoskeletal protein expressed exclusively in spermatocytes. The genome encodes 28-40 nearly identical msp paralogs (msp-3, msp-19, msp-31, msp-36, msp-38, msp-40, msp-45, msp-49, msp-50, msp-51, msp-53, msp-55, msp-56, msp-57, msp-59, msp-63, msp-64, msp-65, msp-66, msp-74, msp-76, msp-77, msp-78, msp-79, msp-81, msp-113, msp-142, msp-152) distributed primarily in a tandem block on chromosome IV around 7.1-7.6 Mb plus a secondary cluster on chrII. Paralogs share >95% nucleotide identity in the coding region; the most recent expansions are essentially indistinguishable at the read level.
expected_copy_count: ~28-40 msp paralogs total; >20 on chrIV in this cluster
